1.q: we observed a stronger auxin response in salt-treated transgenic roots.

2.q: GO and KEGG analyses revealed that upregulated genes in NbCIPK25 overexpressing seedlings under salt stress are enriched in photosynthesis related terms; Calvin-cycle genes including GAPDHs are significantly upregulated in transgenic plants.

3.q: H2O2 accumulation and malondialdehyde (MDA) content were both decreased in NbCIPK25-transgenic plants under salt treatment.
